entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate-smart nutricereal crop targeted for breeding improvements to alleviate food and nutrition insecurities.

entities.name: GENETIC AND GENOMIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Strategies involving genotyping and genome sequencing to catalyze shifts in crop breeding.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION INSECURITIES
entities.description: The state of lacking reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism.

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the entirety of the DNA sequence of an organism's genome.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A method of sequencing the entire genome of multiple individuals to identify genetic variations.

entities.name: PAN-GENOME
entities.description: The entire set of genes within a species, including both core and accessory genes.

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME ASSEMBLIES
entities.description: A high-quality representative genome sequence used as a standard for comparison.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of a plant related to its production and yield.

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the nutritional or commercial value of the crop.

entities.name: ADAPTATION TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics that allow a plant to survive and thrive in specific environments.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand stress caused by living organisms like pests or pathogens.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand non-living environmental stresses like drought or salinity.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses DNA markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection that uses all available markers across the genome to predict breeding values.

entities.name: ACCELERATED BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches designed to shorten the breeding cycle and speed up the development of new cultivars.

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to recover quickly from difficulties or environmental stress.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input or area.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The composition of nutrients in a crop that contribute to human health.
